subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who desireth to quaff the sealed wine, whose seal hath been broken by the fingers of God's power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن اراد ان یشرب الرحیق المختوم الذی فک ختمه باصابع قدره الله
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
